Video.summary: We are here in Doetinchem ľ Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, theyĺre going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon theyĺre all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Letĺs see which shady looking character wins.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 2, Holland Part 1

Video.summary: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because itĺs about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023

Video.summary: For the first time ever, the Worldĺs Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino

Video.summary: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 13, Ukraine

Video.summary: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 14, Romania

Video.summary: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)

Video.summary: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 16, World Finals (Part 2)

Video.summary: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. Weĺre here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, youĺre in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 1, Finland Stage 1

Video.summary: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. Itĺs all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1

Video.summary: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This yearĺs event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1 - Finland

Video.summary: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leaderĺs position for the season. Donĺt miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2 - Serbia

Video.summary: The Worldĺs Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland weĺve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and theyĺll be going all out against each other. Itĺs now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Letĺs start the action.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World

Video.summary: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, itĺs the circus of the extreme.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland

Video.summary: itĺs been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Letĺs see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 12, Bosnia

Video.summary: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. Itĺs an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. Thereĺs only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, thereĺs going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 13, Romania

Video.summary: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 14, Gibraltar

Video.summary: We are in Alanya, on Turkeyĺs south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, weĺll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 15, Turkey Part 1

Video.summary: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. Weĺve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conanĺs Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 3, Holland Part 2

Video.summary: Weĺre in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 4, Serbia Part 1

Video.summary: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! Weĺve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 5, Serbia Part 2

Video.summary: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. Theyĺre going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each otherĺs strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Letĺs find out!
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 6, Joensuu Part 1

Video.summary: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the worldĺs strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and weĺll find out.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 7, Joensuu Part 2

Video.summary: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. Weĺre in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 8, Esposende

Video.summary: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasnĺt been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 9, Great Britain

Video.summary: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 10, Poland Part 1

Video.summary: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?
Video.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 11, Poland Part 2
